questions.question: What was the Industrial Revolution?
questions.answer: Shift from hand tools to machine production.

questions.question: Where did the Industrial Revolution begin?
Name one factor that helped Britain industrialise first.
What is mechanisation?
Name one invention that revolutionised textile production.
What was the significance of steam engines?
How did railways help industrialisation?
questions.answer: Transported raw materials and goods faster.

questions.question: Name one industrial city in Britain.
Who were factory workers?
What problems did workers face in factories?
questions.answer: Long hours, low wages, unsafe conditions.

questions.question: What is urbanisation?
questions.answer: Growth of cities due to migration for work.

questions.question: How did industrialisation affect agriculture?
questions.answer: Increased demand for raw materials and food.

questions.question: What was the role of colonies in industrialisation?
Name one raw material imported from colonies.
What is a joint-stock company?
How did industrialisation affect women?
questions.answer: Many worked in factories with low wages.

questions.question: What is meant by child labour?
questions.answer: Employment of children in factories or mines.

questions.question: How did industrialisation affect transport?
Name one industrial product that Britain exported.
How did industrialisation create social changes?
questions.answer: Changed lifestyles, work patterns, class structures.

questions.question: What is meant by ‘division of labour’?
questions.answer: Breaking work into smaller tasks for efficiency.

questions.question: How did industrialisation affect living conditions in cities?
questions.answer: Overcrowding and poor sanitation caused health issues.

questions.question: Name one European country that industrialised after Britain.
How did industrialisation change trade?
questions.answer: Increased production and demand for raw materials and markets.

questions.question: Why is the 18th century called the beginning of industrial age?
questions.answer: Major technological innovations transformed production methods.
